title: Basbous
body:
# Hi, Welcome to this silly pack.

## Simply adds some variations for some forgotten mobs.
## 

**(OPTIFINE IS BROKEN ATM, USE EMF WITH ETF!!!)**
### Adds: 

<details>
<summary>Show</summary>

- ⭐Basbous
- Albino bats
- African grey parrot
- Brown shelled turtles
- Cockatoo
- Horned sheep
- Two humped camels
- Green axolotl
- Mixed axolotls
- Snow ocelot
</details>

### Revamps:

<details>
<summary>Show</summary>

- Green parrot
- Blue parrot

</details>

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
### Credits:

<details>
<summary>Show</summary>

Axolotl textures:
Amazing axolotls by creepermax123

Parrot textures:
Iron's Bountiful Birds by Iron_Pegasus

Note: I simply used them for inspiration, you could see most of them are edit not the og texture
</details>

(ty for 700 downloads, yayayayay)

### Fresh Animation Compat: [https://modrinth.com/project/basbous-+-fa](https://modrinth.com/project/basbous-+-fa)
